text: Write an Axum middleware that validates an X-API-Key header and returns 401 on failure.
Generate Rust code for a retry wrapper with exponential backoff and jitter around an HTTP call.
Create a React settings panel that edits provider keys, model aliases, and save buttons.
Build a responsive dashboard card that shows latency percentiles and cache hit ratio.
Debug why the OpenAI-compatible handler is returning 502 after a timeout from Groq.
Find the bug causing Anthropic SSE streaming to stop after the first event.
Investigate why the dashboard provider modal loses the edited endpoint after reload.
Review the CSS and explain why the overview sparkline overflows on narrow screens.
Summarize the new classifier_routing configuration options for the README.
Rewrite the installation page to explain offline mode and what does not sync.
Draft architecture notes describing how cache namespacing prevents cross-format collisions.
Prepare release notes describing provider health pings and fail-closed routing.
Plan a rollout for classifier-guided provider routing across staging and production.
Design a migration plan for moving from a single provider to a fallback chain with quotas.
Outline a smoke-test checklist for the dashboard, provider checks, and auth flows.
Create a runbook for rotating provider keys and validating cooldown behavior.
Write a script that extracts classifier labels from benchmark fixtures and exports JSON.
Implement a small Python utility that trains centroid heads from labeled prompts.
Review the routing rules and suggest safer defaults when no classifier rule matches.
Audit the fallback chain so a quota failure on the primary provider still reaches the backup.
Explain the expected classifier output JSON shape and confidence fields for the docs.
Debug why a code-generation request is hitting the default provider instead of the routed one.
Create a TypeScript form that lets operators reorder routing rules by drag and drop.
Review the README example config and make sure the provider/model names are consistent.
